task_language: put both the alphabet soup and the cream cheese box in the basket
pick_result: alphabet_soup placed in basket via pi0_doubled+manual transit; cream_cheese placed via pi0_pick + manual carry; final seat via closed-gripper top-down push
strategy_notes: Living-room scene, 5 named movables. SAM3 segments (agentview hi-res): basket=(0.058,0.229,0.528) via 'silver woven basket on the right' (score 0.86); cream_cheese=(0.097,-0.213,0.456) via 'light blue box on the table' (score 0.32); 'blue label can in back' SAM3-grounded at (-0.116,0.046,0.495) was actually tomato_sauce (red/green can in center back). Discovered alphabet_soup by world_05 pixel scan in back-left at (-0.158,-0.141,0.491) — the can with blue+yellow label that SAM3 couldn't ground by brand. Basket cavity z-filter (z in 0.43-0.46) confirmed BSK_X,BSK_Y ~ (0.058, 0.229). Execution: (Stage A — alphabet_soup) pi0_doubled with FULL task language max_chunks=25 picked the soup can and lifted to z~0.71 but dropped after chunk budget ran out (gripper opened mid-air at z=0.50). Recovered with set_gripper +1 steps=8 (qpos 0.022 — re-grasp succeeded), then scripted lift z=0.70, transit to (0.058,0.229,0.70), release — alphabet_soup landed inside basket cavity. (Stage B — cream_cheese) move_to high pre-pos (0.10,-0.21,0.85) gripper=-1, pi0_pick max_chunks=20 lift_thresh=0.05 succeeded in 10 chunks (gripper closed to 0.024, lift 0.07). Manual transit: lift z=0.75, slide to basket xy, descend z=0.62, release. Predicate still false — box was perched on basket-front rim (z=0.527 vs cavity bottom 0.45). Pi0_doubled follow-up went rogue and grabbed ketchup distractor (Pi0 brand-grounding unreliable); released ketchup back at its origin. (Final seat) closed-gripper top-down push: set_gripper +1 steps=5, move_to (0.007,0.218,0.65) gripper=1, then descend to z=0.56 with step_clip=0.012 — top-down nudge seated the cream_cheese box into the cavity. libero_terminated FIRED on that last move. Total 25 commands. Levers used: world_hi z-filter for basket cavity midpoint; pixel scan for back-left soup can SAM3 couldn't ground by brand; mid-air re-grasp after Pi0 chunk budget exhaustion; closed-gripper top-down push to seat a rim-perched box (when Pi0 follow-up would grab the wrong object).
